summary: All 10 Flowtym features tested and verified. New HousekeepingStats component with Chart.js working correctly. CRM service created (backend only). PMS Bridge loads 11 rooms and reservations from Supabase. NotificationBell working.

minor.issue: Returns 401 Unauthorized - SatisfactionConfig component affected (not HousekeepingStats)

passed_tests: TEST 1: Login Supabase (admin@flowtym.com / admin123) → Successful redirect to /flowboard
TEST 2: Flowboard KPIs display correctly - Occupation 27%, Arrivées 1, Départs 0, En séjour 4 clients, Chambres libres 8/11
TEST 3: Housekeeping Réception Stats KPIs - 11 Chambres, Propreté 73%
TEST 4: Housekeeping Satisfaction tab → HousekeepingStats component visible (data-testid='housekeeping-stats')
TEST 5: HousekeepingStats Period selector - 7 jours / 30 jours / 90 jours visible and clickable
TEST 6: HousekeepingStats Charts grid - Taches terminées, Temps moyen par jour, Temps moyen par priorité (Doughnut), Récapitulatif
TEST 7: HousekeepingStats KPI cards - Total (11), En attente (8), En cours (1), Terminées (2), Taux (18%)
TEST 8: PMS Planning shows 11 rooms (Ch.101-Ch.304) loaded via Supabase Bridge
TEST 9: PMS Planning shows reservations - Sophie, Marc, Elena visible (console: '[Supabase Bridge] Loaded 11 rooms, 15 reservations, 15 clients')
TEST 10: NotificationBell icon visible (data-testid='notification-bell') and panel opens on click (data-testid='notification-panel')
critical_code_review_comments: E-reputation scores remain MOCKED (hardcoded at 4.2/5) in Flowboard.jsx
CRM service (crmService.js) created but not yet connected to a UI component - backend service only
HousekeepingStats shows 'Pas de données pour cette période' for bar/line charts because seeded tasks don't have completed_at timestamps - this is expected behavior
SatisfactionConfig component returns 401 - separate from HousekeepingStats which works correctly
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing Supabase data (11 rooms, 15 reservations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified working. HousekeepingStats component uses Chart.js (chart.js 4.5.1, react-chartjs-2 5.3.1) with Supabase direct queries. The Doughnut chart shows time by priority (Haute/Moyenne/Basse). Charts show 'Pas de données' because seeded tasks lack completed_at timestamps - component works correctly. CRM service at /app/frontend/src/services/crmService.js is backend-only (no UI yet). SQL files at /app/flowtym-sql-*.sql are reference scripts for Supabase SQL Editor.

mocked_apis.E-reputation: global_score hardcoded at 4.2/5 with platforms Google: 4.3, Booking: 4.1, TripAdvisor: 4.2

crmService.status: Created - backend service only, no UI component yet

sql_scripts.status: Reference scripts for Supabase SQL Editor
